name: Picnic Special
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Quaker Oats, uncooked (quick or old-fashioned)
1 Loaf Vienna bread - cut into 24 slices
6 slice Process American cheese - cut in half
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine ground beef, oats, soup mix and milk thoroughly.
2. Shape the mixture to form 12 flat patties.
3. Place patties in broiler or over hot coals for about 5 minutes.
4. Turn and cook for another 5 minutes.
5. To serve, place a tomato slice, leaf of lettuce, half a cheese slice, and a hamburger between two slices of Vienna bread.
6. Reassemble loaf in bread basket.
